headline: Dow (DOW) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Jim Fitterling: Thank you, Andrew.  In the fourth quarter, Team Dow delivered our fifth consecutive quarter of year-over-year volume growth despite continued weak macroeconomic conditions.  Cash flow from continuing operations was $811 million, resulting in free cash flow of $44 million.

raw.headline: Dow (DOW) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
raw.summary: Jim Fitterling: Thank you, Andrew.  In the fourth quarter, Team Dow delivered our fifth consecutive quarter of year-over-year volume growth despite continued weak macroeconomic conditions.  Cash flow from continuing operations was $811 million, resulting in free cash flow of $44 million.

headline: Dow Is Getting a New CEO. The Stock Is Down.
summary: Amid energy price turmoil caused by the Iran conflict, commodity chemical producer  Dow  announced a leadership transition on Tuesday.  Chief Operating Officer Karen Carter will take over for outgoing CEO Jim Fitterling, effective July 1.  Carter will join the board of directors, and Fitterling will serve as executive board chair.

headline: Dow Chair and CEO Jim Fitterling to Become Executive Chair; Karen S. Carter Appointed Chief Executive Officer
summary: Dow (NYSE: DOW) today announced that Jim Fitterling, Chair and Chief Executive Officer, will become Executive Chair of the Board, effective July 1, 2026. The Dow Board of Directors has appointed Karen S. Carter, currently Chief Operating Officer, as Chief Executive Officer, effective July 1, 2026. Carter will also join Dow's Board of Directors at that time. Richard Davis will continue to serve as Dow's Independent Lead Director.

The Dow Board of Directors has appointed Karen S. Carter, currently Chief Operating Officer, as Chief Executive Officer, effective July 1, 2026. Carter will also join Dow's Board of Directors at that time. Richard Davis will continue to serve as Dow's Independent Lead Director.
